hooks.command: sh -c 'root=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}; [ -n "$root" ] || { echo "agent-guard: plugin root env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; "$root/bin/agent-guard" hook-pre-tool'
sh -c 'root=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}; [ -n "$root" ] || { echo "agent-guard: plugin root env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; "$root/bin/agent-guard" hook-post-tool'
sh -c 'root=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}; [ -n "$root" ] || { echo "agent-guard: plugin root env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; "$root/bin/agent-guard" hook-stop'
